_doc: apps axis sub-SSOT — consumer software application surface where mobile compute + cognitive AI + physical optics + sensor physics intersect. Distinct from compute axis (silicon engineering scope) and cognitive axis (AI research scope) and physics axis (fundamental physics scope): apps axis is for the consumer-software-product surface where real-time UX + mobile-power-budget + multi-axis precursor inheritance dominate.

_meta._category_name: consumer software apps: camera-filter / media / fitness / social / productivity / accessibility — mobile-compute + cognitive-AI + physics-optics intersection surface
_meta._honesty_note: _verified_count / _alien_index_avg null on creation; populate from atlas.n6 aggregation once the first MVP measurements land per per-domain falsifier deadlines.

_changelog: 1.0.0 (2026-05-01): apps axis sub-SSOT created. camera-filter-app registered (consumer mobile camera filter application; real-time 60-fps preview + AI-augmented stylization; precursors compute/chip-architecture + cognitive/ai-multimodal + cognitive/ai-inference-cost + cognitive/ai-quality-scale + physics/optics + physics/electromagnetism).

1.1.0 (2026-05-01): hexa-filter-algebra registered (filter authoring/composition framework; sister to camera-filter-app — FILTER-ALGEBRA authors, camera-filter-app applies; 9 primitive operations + composition algebra + auto-generation from N=5 reference pairs + LPIPS/SSIM/PSNR provable quality bounds + 16.67 ms hard real-time ceiling; vs VSCO 1-2-week artist labor; 6 precursors compute/chip-architecture + cognitive/ai-multimodal + cognitive/ai-quality-scale + physics/optics + physics/electromagnetism + compute/chip-design; F-FA-MVP-1..5 falsifier gates 2026-08-30 / 2026-09-30; alien-grade 10 PHYSICAL-LIMIT).

1.2.0 (2026-05-01): hexa-parallel-self registered (consumer mobile selfie filter app; slot-machine 8-grid alternate-self generation via latent diffusion + InstantID + LoRA per-timeline weights; 5-axis identity exploration era/culture/profession/aesthetic/personal; 18 ms p95 inference; sister to camera-filter-app — PARALLEL-SELF generates alternate selves, camera-filter-app applies aesthetic filters; 6 precursors cognitive/ai-multimodal + cognitive/ai-inference-cost + cognitive/ai-quality-scale + compute/chip-architecture + cognitive/ai-alignment + cognitive/ai-eval-pipeline; F-PSELF-MVP-1..5 falsifier gates 2026-08-30 / 2026-09-30; alien-grade 10 PHYSICAL-LIMIT). Plus hexa-main-character registered (cinematic-look video filter app; 9 unified Hollywood effects — aspect/teal-orange/slow-mo/bokeh/lens-flare/grain/freeze/music/title; 16.67 ms real-time per camera-filter-app inheritance; main-character-energy market — TikTok #maincharacterenergy 5B+ views; 6 precursors compute/chip-architecture + cognitive/ai-multimodal + cognitive/ai-inference-cost + cognitive/ai-quality-scale + physics/optics + physics/electromagnetism; F-MC-MVP-1..5 falsifier gates 2026-08-30 / 2026-09-30; alien-grade 10 PHYSICAL-LIMIT). apps axis count 2 → 4.

physical_limit_anchors.real_time_frame_budget_ms: 16.67 ms = 1000/60 fps (Nyquist visual perception >= 24 fps; smooth UX target = 60 fps)
physical_limit_anchors.npu_compute_budget_TOPS: 17.5 TOPS = 50% of Apple A17 Pro 35 TOPS (mk1 headroom design constraint)
physical_limit_anchors.roofline_model: Williams-Waterman-Patterson 2009 — operational intensity (FLOPs/byte) vs DRAM bandwidth ceiling (51.2 GB/s on iPhone 15 Pro)
physical_limit_anchors.airy_diffraction_limit_um: Airy 1835 — theta_min = 1.22 lambda/D; mobile lens f/1.7 at 555 nm gives Airy radius ~1.15 um, matching 1.0-1.4 um pixel pitch (diffraction-balanced)
physical_limit_anchors.poisson_shot_noise_SNR_dB: sigma_shot = sqrt(N_photons); daylight ~10000 photons/pixel/frame -> SNR ~40 dB
physical_limit_anchors.jpeg_quantization: Wallace 1991 / ISO/IEC 10918-1 — qfactor 75-95 corridor for filter output, file size proportional to pixel_count / qfactor
physical_limit_anchors.rec2020_color_gamut: WCG covers >= 75% CIE 1931 vs sRGB ~36%; HDR10 + Rec.2020 supported
physical_limit_anchors.energy_per_frame_mJ: 50 mJ/frame budget (3 W camera-active * 16.67 ms = 50 mJ; 4000 mAh / 3 W ~ 4.8 hr active runtime headroom)

falsifiers: F-CFA-MVP-1 (2026-08-30): real-time latency p95 > 25 ms on iPhone 15 Pro at 60 fps preview -> retract real-time claim
F-CFA-MVP-2 (2026-08-30): NPU utilization > 50% on flagship at filter-active -> retract headroom design margin
F-CFA-MVP-3 (2026-08-30): output JPEG @ qfactor 85 size > 4 MB at 12 MP -> retract compression target
F-CFA-MVP-4 (2026-09-30): perceptual quality MOS (Mean Opinion Score) < 4.0/5 on N=30 user panel -> retract quality target
F-CFA-MVP-5 (2026-09-30): energy per frame > 75 mJ -> retract battery-life claim (would deplete 4000 mAh in <2 hr active use)

domains.verb_distinction: FILTER-ALGEBRA AUTHORS / COMPILES filters; camera-filter-app APPLIES them. Shared 16.67 ms real-time budget (DAG handoff at compile output)

physical_limit_anchors.shannon_DPI_bits_per_pixel: Shannon 1948 Data Processing Inequality — filter cannot exceed 24 bits/pixel for 8-bit RGB input (entropy ceiling)
physical_limit_anchors.wiener_inverse_gain: Wiener 1949 — minimum noise-amplification inverse filter G = |H|^2 / (|H|^2 + K) bounded in (0, 1) for K > 0; sharpening primitive U lower bound
physical_limit_anchors.tishby_information_bottleneck_LUT: Tishby 1999 information bottleneck — 33^3 = 35937 LUT nodes optimal at K-L divergence threshold (Adobe Premiere industry standard)
physical_limit_anchors.lpips_perceptual_threshold: Zhang 2018 LPIPS — design threshold 0.15 vs indistinguishability 0.20 (30% headroom; AlexNet/VGG/SqueezeNet feature distance)
physical_limit_anchors.ssim_perceptual_threshold: Wang-Bovik 2004 SSIM — design threshold >= 0.95 (structural similarity perceptual fidelity)
physical_limit_anchors.real_time_chain_depth: 16.67 ms / 3.5 ms-per-primitive = depth 4 ceiling (camera-filter-app shared 60-fps Nyquist budget)
physical_limit_anchors.roofline_OI_threshold: Williams-Waterman-Patterson 2009 Roofline — operational intensity > 10 FLOPs/byte for compute-bound regime
physical_limit_anchors.cluster_poisson_grain: Cox 1955 cluster Poisson model for stochastic film-grain primitive N
physical_limit_anchors.reinhard_devlin_local_tone: Reinhard-Devlin 2002 photoreceptor-physiology operator for local-tone-mapping primitive
physical_limit_anchors.cie_1931_color_matching_nm: CIE 1931 2-degree standard observer 360-830 nm visible spectrum (color-space change primitive)
physical_limit_anchors.n_reference_pairs_inverse_problem: N = 5 reference image pairs sufficient for inverse-problem auto-generation (linear regression on 9 RGB unknowns + 1D regression on tone curve + FFT grain match + He 2015 residual CNN)
physical_limit_anchors.nine_primitive_operations: 9 primitive ops closed under composition algebra: M (color matrix) / T (tone curve) / K (convolution) / C (color-space change) / N (grain) / H (histogram match) / L (local tone) / V (vignette) / U (sharpening)

falsifiers: F-FA-MVP-1 (2026-08-30): runtime detection of (f∘g)∘h ≠ f∘(g∘h) for ANY composition in the defined primitive set -> algebra associativity claim retracted; primitive set restricted
F-FA-MVP-2 (2026-08-30): auto-generation from N=5 reference pairs gives LPIPS gap > 0.20 vs hand-crafted -> inverse-problem fidelity insufficient
F-FA-MVP-3 (2026-08-30): filter chain depth >= 4 exceeds 16.67 ms p95 on iPhone 15 Pro -> real-time claim retracted; depth cap applied
F-FA-MVP-4 (2026-09-30): N=30 blind A/B test, hand-crafted vs HEXA-generated preference < 40% -> quality claim retracted
F-FA-MVP-5 (2026-09-30): commute claim violation at runtime — (M, T) labeled non-commute but found to commute, OR (M1, M2) labeled commute but found to NOT commute -> algebra correctness violated

domains.verb_distinction: PARALLEL-SELF GENERATES alternate selves via slot-machine 8-grid; camera-filter-app APPLIES aesthetic filters. Different verb, same apps axis.

physical_limit_anchors.latent_diffusion: Rombach 2022 Stable Diffusion v3 quantised ~3 GB on-device
physical_limit_anchors.instantid_identity_preservation: Wang 2024 InstantID — Cosine similarity > 0.85 face-embedding lock
physical_limit_anchors.clip_image_embedding: Radford 2021 CLIP-Image 512-dim latent for facial feature lock
physical_limit_anchors.lora_per_timeline: Hu 2021 LoRA — rank ≤ 16, INT8 quantised ≤ 50 MB per timeline
physical_limit_anchors.ddim_sampling: Song 2020 DDIM — 4-step denoising at 18 ms p95 inference
physical_limit_anchors.npu_compute_budget: 17.5 TOPS = 50% Apple A17 Pro 35 TOPS (camera-filter-app inheritance)

falsifiers: F-PSELF-MVP-1 (2026-08-30): InstantID identity-preservation Cosine < 0.85 between input selfie and 8-grid -> identity-lock claim retracted
F-PSELF-MVP-2 (2026-08-30): single-tap latency p95 > 25 ms on iPhone 15 Pro -> real-time slot-machine claim retracted
F-PSELF-MVP-3 (2026-08-30): N=30 blind A/B vs FaceApp/Reface preference < 50% -> quality claim retracted
F-PSELF-MVP-4 (2026-09-30): generated content classified deepfake by C2PA / Adobe Content Credentials -> safety/alignment claim retracted
F-PSELF-MVP-5 (2026-09-30): cross-cultural mk2 generation flagged appropriation by N=10 cultural reviewers -> mk2 culture-jump retract

domains.verb_distinction: MAIN-CHARACTER applies CINEMATIC DIRECTION to videos (9 effects + genre detection); camera-filter-app APPLIES aesthetic filters (real-time still+video preview). Same apps axis, different verb.

physical_limit_anchors.aspect_ratio_2_39_anamorphic: Cinerama / Panavision standard since 1953; auto-letterbox preserves all source pixels
physical_limit_anchors.lucas_kanade_optical_flow: Lucas-Kanade 1981 sub-pixel motion vector field at 16 ms / frame
physical_limit_anchors.hexagonal_aperture_lens_flare: Snell + Fresnel; 6-blade aperture → 6-point flare physics (J.J. Abrams Star Trek 2009)
physical_limit_anchors.clap_audio_text_embedding: Wu et al. 2023 — 512-dim joint embedding for scene-music matching
physical_limit_anchors.reinhard_devlin_2002_tone_operator: Photographic global+local tone mapping for HDR cinematic range

falsifiers: F-MC-MVP-1 (2026-08-30): real-time 60-fps p95 latency > 25 ms with all 9 effects active -> real-time claim retracted
F-MC-MVP-2 (2026-08-30): N=30 blind A/B vs Instagram + VSCO + Premiere Rush mobile preference < 50% -> quality claim retracted
F-MC-MVP-3 (2026-08-30): genre auto-detection accuracy < 70% on 1000-clip labeled test set -> genre classifier retract
F-MC-MVP-4 (2026-09-30): scene-music CLAP MOS < 4.0/5 on N=20 panel -> music suggestion claim retracted
F-MC-MVP-5 (2026-09-30): aperture-shape lens flare diverges > 5° from 6-blade physical model -> physics fidelity retract
